description_for_model: Plugin for managing HubSpot CRM data. Use this plugin to create new contacts, update existing contact properties, and search for deals by keyword. Always confirm contact details with the user before creating or updating records.
description_for_human: Create and update HubSpot contacts and search deals from Microsoft 365 Copilot.

actions.description: Creates a new contact in HubSpot CRM. Requires first name, last name, and email. Optionally accepts a phone number.
Updates properties on an existing HubSpot contact by contact ID.
Searches HubSpot deals by keyword. Returns deal name, amount, pipeline stage, and close date.
